typecheck.command: npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/client/tsconfig.json

blockingIssues.description: packages/server/src/controllers/scenarioController.ts (`diffScenarios`) can return HTTP 200 for valid-but-nonexistent scenario IDs, which the reviewer flagged as conflicting with VAL-AUTHZ-007 expectations for 403/404 on non-existent IDs.
README.md documents `npm run typecheck`, but root package.json does not define a `typecheck` script, so documented verification steps fail.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to reflect that `Organization.memberIds[]` is now used by authorization middleware, and updated Sidebar description to include the New Organization action.
Updated `.factory/library/user-testing.md` with concrete post-auth API bootstrap endpoints/payloads for creating orgs, scenarios, and employees.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align typecheck guidance with `.factory/services.yaml` by recommending per-package `tsc -p` commands (or define and enforce a root `npm run typecheck` script consistently).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews (setup-testing-infra, setup-linting) reported churn from AGENTS.md recommending root `npx tsc --noEmit` while services.yaml uses per-package commands.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit exception paths for config-only/docs-only features so TDD red-first and browser validation steps are conditionally required only when meaningful.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for setup-testing-infra, setup-linting, add-readme, and add-authorization all reported procedure mismatch with current skill defaults.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit evidence when `followedProcedure=true` for user-visible changes (e.g., agent-browser invocation and interactiveChecks), or require a documented deviation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for fix-api-bugs and fix-hierarchyview-filters found user-visible/UI-related changes without recorded agent-browser verification despite skill requirements.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated reports that skill TDD/browser requirements are too rigid for non-UI bootstrap work.
Repeated reports about AGENTS.md vs services.yaml typecheck command mismatch.
Repeated reports of stale architecture notes about Sidebar capabilities.
Single-run ordering complaint about not executing an explicit red test phase before implementation in fix-spreadsheet-filters.
